# Seattle’s Iconic Shine~ Now In 2 States!  

### Washington & Arizona
From the rainy streets of Seattle to the sun-soaked roads of Arizona, Elephant Car Wash is here to keep your ride looking its best. With locations in both **Washington and Arizona** , we make it easy to get a top-notch clean—**rain or shine, dust or drizzle.**
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Washington State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEWashinton.svg)](http://elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Arizona State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEAZ.svg)](http://elephantcarwash.com/</our-arizona-wash-locations>)
### Have Some Questions?
  * ###  How can I sign up for a Club Membership at a Tunnel location? 
Please note that our Club Memberships refer only to our Express Tunnel locations. You can sign up either on our website by clicking [here](http://elephantcarwash.com/</buy-carwashes-and-memberships-now>) or on the kiosk at any of our Tunnel locations.
  * ###  Can I safely go through the wash with a roof rack or bike rack on my car?
    * **At the Tunnels:** Our team can look at the roof rack to make sure it’s safe to go through. The top brushes may be retracted as a precautionary measure. Bike racks on the back of the vehicle cannot go through the tunnel wash. 
  

    * **At the Touchless Washes:** Roof racks are fine as long as they are under the clearance bar. Rear mounted bike racks are not recommended. 
  

  * ###  What is the difference between the tunnel wash and the touchless wash?
Tunnel washes use cloth material and a conveyor to move your car through, with friction from the cloth helping to clean the vehicle more effectively. These washes are designed to be safe for your car, as the soft, durable cloth is gentle on the paint while providing a thorough clean. 
  

Touchless washes rely on high-pressure water and soap without physical contact. When you drive into a touch-free car wash, the system applies cleaning agents, rinses them away, and then applies specialty treatments like wax and sealants.

## Gentle & Powerful
### Download our App:
[![Elephant car wash WAwash app](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANTCARWASH_app_APP_wa.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</touchless-wash-app>)

# Touchless  

# Car Wash
###### Our touchless car washes are incredibly popular! Using high-pressure water and specially formulated detergents, we effortlessly break down stubborn dirt, road grime, and salt, leaving your vehicle spotless—all without any friction!﻿
[ Touchless Washes ](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)

## Tough on Dirt,
## Easy On Your Car!
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANTCarWash_LOGO_2025_CARWASH-4aaa4798.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
### Powerful Cleaning
###### Tough on dirt, easy on your car. Our detergents and high-pressure wash does all the work.
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANTcar+wash+--+hrs_OPEN+24HRS.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
### Open 24/7
###### Late nights? Busy schedule? Get a powerful, touchless clean anytime—day or night at our touchless wash locations!
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANTCarWash_LOGO_2025_FAST-ef1c7424.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
### Fast & Convenient
###### We know your time is valuable, that's why you can get a touchless clean in just a few minutes!
# Community  

# Car Wash
###### We’re not just a car wash—we’re a **Seattle legend!** Home to the famous pink elephant, we’re here to give your ride a **top-notch clean, your way!** Whether you prefer the speed and efficiency of our **Express Washes,** enjoy the value and convenience of our in-bay automatic **Touch-Free Washes,** or want to take charge in our **Self-Serve bays** , we make it easy to keep your car looking its best—**no hassle, no fuss, just a sparkling shine every time.**
[ Community ](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</community>)
![ELEPHANT CAR WASH](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/opt/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_HEAD_LFTshadow-1920w.png)
## Our Wash History
### Proudly serving the Puget Sound for 75 years!
[ Our History ](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-carwash-history>)
![ELEPHANT CAR WASH](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/opt/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO_sm_CARWASH_LFTwhiteoutline-1920w.png)
# Seattle’s Iconic Shine~ Now In 2 States!  

### Washington & Arizona
From the rainy streets of Seattle to the sun-soaked roads of Arizona, Elephant Car Wash is here to keep your ride looking its best. With locations in both **Washington and Arizona** , we make it easy to get a top-notch clean—**rain or shine, dust or drizzle.**
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Washington State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEWashinton.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Arizona State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEAZ.svg)](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</our-arizona-wash-locations>)
### Have Some Questions?
  * ###  How can I sign up for a Club Membership at a Tunnel location? 
Please note that our Club Memberships refer only to our Express Tunnel locations. You can sign up either on our website by clicking [here](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</buy-carwashes-and-memberships-now>) or on the kiosk at any of our Tunnel locations.
  * ###  Can I safely go through the wash with a roof rack or bike rack on my car?
    * **At the Tunnels:** Our team can look at the roof rack to make sure it’s safe to go through. The top brushes may be retracted as a precautionary measure. Bike racks on the back of the vehicle cannot go through the tunnel wash. 
  

    * **At the Touchless Washes:** Roof racks are fine as long as they are under the clearance bar. Rear mounted bike racks are not recommended. 
  

  * ###  What is the difference between the tunnel wash and the touchless wash?
Tunnel washes use cloth material and a conveyor to move your car through, with friction from the cloth helping to clean the vehicle more effectively. These washes are designed to be safe for your car, as the soft, durable cloth is gentle on the paint while providing a thorough clean. 
  

Touchless washes rely on high-pressure water and soap without physical contact. When you drive into a touch-free car wash, the system applies cleaning agents, rinses them away, and then applies specialty treatments like wax and sealants.

### Have Some Questions?
  * ###  How can I sign up for a Club Membership at a Tunnel location? 
Please note that our Club Memberships refer only to our Express Tunnel locations. You can sign up either on our website by clicking [here](http://www.elephantcarwash.com/</buy-carwashes-and-memberships-now>) or on the kiosk at any of our Tunnel locations.
  * ###  Can I safely go through the wash with a roof rack or bike rack on my car?
    * **At the Tunnels:** Our team can look at the roof rack to make sure it’s safe to go through. The top brushes may be retracted as a precautionary measure. Bike racks on the back of the vehicle cannot go through the tunnel wash. 
  

    * **At the Touchless Washes:** Roof racks are fine as long as they are under the clearance bar. Rear mounted bike racks are not recommended. 
  

  * ###  What is the difference between the tunnel wash and the touchless wash?
Tunnel washes use cloth material and a conveyor to move your car through, with friction from the cloth helping to clean the vehicle more effectively. These washes are designed to be safe for your car, as the soft, durable cloth is gentle on the paint while providing a thorough clean. 
  

Touchless washes rely on high-pressure water and soap without physical contact. When you drive into a touch-free car wash, the system applies cleaning agents, rinses them away, and then applies specialty treatments like wax and sealants.

# Touchless  

# Car Wash

## Easy On Your Car!

### Powerful Cleaning

### Open 24/7
###### Late nights? Busy schedule? Get a powerful, touchless clean anytime—day or night at our touchless wash locations!

### Fast & Convenient

# Community  

# Car Wash
###### We’re not just a car wash—we’re a **Seattle legend!** Home to the famous pink elephant, we’re here to give your ride a **top-notch clean, your way!** Whether you prefer the speed and efficiency of our **Express Washes,** enjoy the value and convenience of our in-bay automatic **Touch-Free Washes,** or want to take charge in our **Self-Serve bays** , we make it easy to keep your car looking its best—**no hassle, no fuss, just a sparkling shine every time.**

## Our Wash History
### Proudly serving the Puget Sound for 75 years!
[ Our History ](http://elephantcarwash.com/</our-carwash-history>)

# Seattle’s Iconic Shine~ Now In 2 States!  

### Washington & Arizona
From the rainy streets of Seattle to the sun-soaked roads of Arizona, Elephant Car Wash is here to keep your ride looking its best. With locations in both **Washington and Arizona** , we make it easy to get a top-notch clean—**rain or shine, dust or drizzle.**
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Washington State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEWashinton.svg)](http://elephantcarwash.com/</our-washington-wash-locations>)
[![ELEPHANT CAR WASH Arizona State locations](https://irp.cdn-website.com/f19e9389/dms3rep/multi/ELEPHANT+SUPER+CAR+WASH+LOGO+%281%29_STATEAZ.svg)](http://elephantcarwash.com/</our-arizona-wash-locations>)
### Have Some Questions?
  * ###  How can I sign up for a Club Membership at a Tunnel location? 
Please note that our Club Memberships refer only to our Express Tunnel locations. You can sign up either on our website by clicking [here](http://elephantcarwash.com/</buy-carwashes-and-memberships-now>) or on the kiosk at any of our Tunnel locations.
  * ###  Can I safely go through the wash with a roof rack or bike rack on my car?
    * **At the Tunnels:** Our team can look at the roof rack to make sure it’s safe to go through. The top brushes may be retracted as a precautionary measure. Bike racks on the back of the vehicle cannot go through the tunnel wash. 
  

    * **At the Touchless Washes:** Roof racks are fine as long as they are under the clearance bar. Rear mounted bike racks are not recommended. 
  

  * ###  What is the difference between the tunnel wash and the touchless wash?
Tunnel washes use cloth material and a conveyor to move your car through, with friction from the cloth helping to clean the vehicle more effectively. These washes are designed to be safe for your car, as the soft, durable cloth is gentle on the paint while providing a thorough clean. 
  

Touchless washes rely on high-pressure water and soap without physical contact. When you drive into a touch-free car wash, the system applies cleaning agents, rinses them away, and then applies specialty treatments like wax and sealants.

# ipswich car wash
210 High Street Ipswich Massachusetts 01938

Now accepting Wireless tap pay on Wash, Vacuums, and Vending Machines 
## 
[](https://www.riversideautoipswich.com/<#h.4u4v9jj50b2b>)
Tired of dragging out the hose and bucket? stop by our fully automated touch free carwash and leave the work to us!
![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/sitesv/APaQ0STnssZYc6-sr3jUGNGiKL7hiyw5RsobSJXTww1-GOEZeT-aLzySSs59-SOmLf0CUI7AgRxkNQBtuAlUaAK0VOMdvQsuTeqtmL131Jj43E6VWypRZXAGIs88KH4D5zQXIhogJTAESU8-CdjK5dLZuE5zzJEb1F9jYjbTDD1AHAsrbEfll12EUH-s3oFnWdtMpIo-0hOsHp8SFJSDA6hyD104da_DaOTzngyQMKE=w1280)
Background
Operating since 2005, the Ipswich Car Wash has three fully automated car wash bays as well as three spot to vacuum your car. The wash is a completely touch free wash which is accomplished through the use of Simonize® products and water pressure of over 1200 PSI.
INTERIOR DETAILING 
If you are in the mood to clean your interior, there are Armor All® products available for purchase and Little Tree® air fresheners on the right side of the building when approaching the wash bays.
![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/sitesv/APaQ0SS5akDTmU0E5R53ezsatE30erIUvXYqKc2w0TjMI3wQYOnLwhSoPOdyGI7EgVmmT-nfuikCs0JAhnEGZLYEnlu_kHPX8qKU6Xtg2MpQdBOhl3dGPhuAbPgHrFDcnSz9De-7rVk9UPl6WS-6ffxBvexVOrKgG3EmUWoG8DjdAYbHVS8t-UoFSg4U_sgVSUenc7gInRSS9Nm3DxcNJQTi-WhSdxuqwkMqg7t9uCI=w1280)
![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/sitesv/APaQ0SRI-8k9Efri6dYb5wir5iuIPgyIuI4rWPk5TGs8RaNnQpAafoLrEG99P5RHtyACrzaSObFFKiTZ7PHiCxPiO2dC3gL2WwlTGPMeAP_cMK0ofFPIYDxXROLGKq0QrQ7JBlf2i_kK22FWEWKM7Ow_zuJ_gV1AW84plL37izOBvEBdZJJeP_49hCJN10FeVH0bcegAOCJOXlhkvdYm42CTRyeSYKsYwy_XaD435pI=w1280)
# 
[](https://www.riversideautoipswich.com/<#h.udkvrmo2sb8>)
Vacuums 
The Ipswich car wash has 4 vacuums available for use as well as an air compressor for filling tires and carpet cleaner. Vacuums now accept bills, tap to pay cards, and coins. The vacuums begin to run for four minutes after inserting $2.00 and increase time with each quarter after that. 
ENVIROMENTAL IMPACT
At the Ipswich Car Wash we wash with recycled rainwater. The pavement around the property is pitched so that all rainwater is collected. Once collected the rainwater is stored in our 60,000 gallons underground Systran. Before your vehicle is sprayed, water is sent through numerous filters to remove minerals and other contaminants that create water spots. 
Get in touch with us at Danielsherburne@riversideautoipswich.com or 1 (978) 356-3240.
If you have any feedback, please email CustomerService@riversideautoipswich.com.

##  Clean As New
Uncle Chick’s Car Wash specializes in touch-free, self-service car wash in Oldsmar, FL.
[ Get Started __](http://unclechicks.com/</contact/>)
#  Offering Excellent Touch-Free Car Wash Services
OPEN 24/7
**"A clean car looks better, drives better, and lasts longer!"**
Family-Owned-and-Operated Since 2001
  * ### 
[3695 Tampa Rd. Oldsmar, Florida 34677](http://unclechicks.com/<https:/goo.gl/maps/SFW9uRHnotBsMBVd7>)


[ Exterior Services ](http://unclechicks.com/</exterior-services/>)
[ Touch Free Automatic Car Wash ](http://unclechicks.com/</interior-services/>)
[ Self Service Car Wash ](http://unclechicks.com/</contact/>)
We own and operate our wash, attending daily for service and repairs to keep Uncle Chick's in tip-top shape. Many of our competitors are just investors who hire out all work and maintenance, resulting in poor wash quality and many breakdowns giving the touch-free wash a bad reputation.
We offer the latest and greatest Water Wizard 2.0 touch-free automatic system, the most advanced touch-free on the market. We've taken it to a new level by outfitting ours with turbo nozzles, which clean better than traditional nozzles using half the water! Uncle Chick's also has 5 large self-service wash bays with every option you could want right at your fingertips.  _Credit cards, cash, quarters, and tokens_ are accepted in all self-service wash bays.
![fm=f_OppB8eB](https://unclechicks.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/10/fmf_OppB8eB.jpg)
##  What a touch-free wash is and what it is not.
![fm=f_7089](https://unclechicks.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/10/fmf_7089.jpg)
A great touch-free wash is convenient, fast, environmentally friendly, economical, won't damage vehicles finish, and most importantly, works great!
###  The Pros
A good touch-free is convenient and typically fast compared to a full-service wash. You never have to leave your vehicle or worry about any valuables disappearing after car wash employees are done. It never comes into contact with the vehicle surface at any point during the wash, thereby eliminating any costly damages many full-service washes (conveyer) contend with.
Many variables can influence the touch-free wash process including, but not limited to, quality of soap, vehicle temperature surface, presoak dilution ratio, presoak temperature, dwell time (amount of time presoak spends on vehicle surface), water pressure, impingement, water quality/water hardness, TDS (total dissolved solids in spot-free water).
##  Even a great touch-free has its limitations.
###  The Cons
Even the best well-maintained touch-free is limited in its capabilities simply because it does not use friction or touch the vehicle surface.  _Simply put, if you haven't washed your car in months or have really ground in dirt, don't expect a miracle._
We are always looking to improve your car wash experience, so please contact us with your comments/suggestions.
We have 20 infrared motion-sensing cameras on-site covering all areas of the wash from multiple angles to ensure our security and your safety.
![fm=f_pYW9Jqw](https://unclechicks.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/10/fmf_pYW9Jqw.jpg)
![henry1](https://unclechicks.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/10/henry1.jpg)
##  About Us
My Great-Uncle Chick built one of the first fully automatic, full-service conveyor washes in the St. Louis Mo. area in 1951. The Big Bend automatic car washes slogan was "A clean car looks better, drives better, and lasts longer." It was located on the corner of Clayton Road and Big bend Road.
We are a small, family-owned-and-operated wash opening our doors in 2001. Please feel free to contact us with any questions or suggestions on our contact page.

## Your Vehicle Faces Daily Challenges in Northern Colorado
Seasonal Challenges
![Frozen car windows covered in snow after winter weather.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Winter-hazard-on-car.png)
### Winter Hazards
The winter months bring unique challenges to vehicle maintenance in our region. Road salt and magnesium chloride used to treat icy roads can be particularly damaging to your vehicle’s undercarriage and paint. These substances are highly corrosive and can lead to premature rusting and deterioration of vital components if not regularly removed. Our specialized Mag Chloride pre-soak treatments are specifically formulated to neutralize and remove these corrosive substances, protecting your investment throughout the harsh winter season.
![Dead ants on a car windshield after an ant invasion, illustrating the importance of professional auto cleaning and pest removal services offered by Bee Clean Auto Wash.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Image.png)
### Summer Debris
As temperatures rise, so does the insect population. Summer driving often results in a windshield and front bumper covered in bug residue, which can etch into your clear coat if left untreated. Additionally, tree sap, pollen, and bird droppings become more prevalent, all of which contain acidic compounds that can damage your vehicle’s finish. Our Summer Bug pre-soak application is designed to safely dissolve these proteins and acids before they can cause lasting damage.
## Environmental Factors
![Sunshine-themed car wash with bright colors, promoting eco-friendly vehicle cleaning services.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Vector.png)
### UV Damage
Colorado’s high elevation means increased exposure to harmful ultraviolet rays, which can fade and oxidize your vehicle’s paint over time. Regular waxing and ceramic protection treatments create a barrier against these damaging rays, preserving your vehicle’s color and shine.
![Bee Clean auto wash logo with a sleek design and vibrant colors, representing professional vehicle cleaning services.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Vector-1.png)
### Dust and Dirt Accumulation
Our semi-arid climate means dust is a constant companion on our roads. This fine particulate matter can work its way into crevices and, when wet, can act like sandpaper against your paint. Regular cleaning prevents this buildup and protects your vehicle’s surfaces.
![Bee Clean auto wash logo featuring a stylized honeycomb pattern and two green trees.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Vector-3.png)
### Agricultural Environments
The agricultural activity surrounding Greeley and Evans introduces additional challenges, including exposure to fertilizers, pesticides, and organic matter that can be particularly corrosive to automotive finishes.
## The Cost of Neglect
Delaying regular washing and protective treatments can lead to:
![Rusty and corroded car exhaust pipe showing significant corrosion and oxidation deterioration.](https://spcdn.shortpixel.ai/spio/ret_img,q_cdnize,to_auto,s_webp:avif/beecleanautowash.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/rust-in-car.png)

## Deterioration of rubber seals and trim pieces

## Our Expertise and Commitment
### Locally Owned Understanding
As a locally owned and operated business, we experience the same road conditions, weather patterns, and environmental factors as you do. This firsthand understanding allows us to develop cleaning solutions specifically tailored to our region’s unique challenges.
Our owners personally oversees operations across all five locations, ensuring that each facility maintains the high standards our customers have come to expect. This hands-on approach means we can quickly adapt to seasonal changes and customer feedback, providing you with the most effective cleaning experience possible.
### Industry-Leading Technology
We continuously invest in the most advanced washing technology available:
Laser Contouring Systems: Our Karcher automatic systems use laser measurements to precisely map your vehicle’s contours, ensuring thorough cleaning without wasted water or product.
Typhoon Pressure Systems: Delivering optimal water pressure to remove even the most stubborn road grime without risking damage to your vehicle’s finish.
Specialized Seasonal Formulations: Our cleaning solutions change with the seasons, offering specialized bug removal in summer and mag chloride neutralization in winter.
Ceramic Protection Options: Advanced polymer technology that bonds to your paint, providing months of protection against UV rays, water spots, and contaminants.

We actively seek and incorporate customer feedback to refine our services and address specific needs. This commitment to improvement has led to many of our most popular features, including extended dryer cycles and specialized pre-soak options.

### Wash your car all you want
Become a monthly FastPass member and wash every day for one price! A small micro chip sticker is placed inside your window, then every time you drive up to the Auto Pay Terminal your car wash package is automatically selected and the gate opens. Doesn't get any easier!
![...](http://www.rapidcarwash.org/images/img-02.jpg)
### Soft Cloth Foam Wash
The Perinton Express Tunnel is equipped with the most technologically advanced car washing equipment available today. All equipment is 100% made and manufactured in the USA.The Perinton Express Tunnel is the most eco-friendly warm water car wash in Rochester. 
![...](http://www.rapidcarwash.org/images/img-03.jpg)
### Touch Free Wash
Washing Excellence: The LaserWash system. Through the use of powerful technology, the LaserWash G5 delivers outstanding wash results. With a customer-friendly and efficient design, getting a car wash is fast and easy.
# Perinton Express Rapid Laser Wash
Perinton Express Rapid Laser Wash is a family owned and operated business that is dedicated to providing our customers with the finest self-serve, touch-free, soft foam touch tunnel available today. Our facility utilizes state-of-the-art wash technology and our equipment is continuously monitored by chemical specialists to ensure consistent wash quality.  
  
Give us a try and let us know what you think. Customer Satisfaction is our first priority and we encourage and welcome your feedback.

## Visit our Uniontown Car Wash
Hometown Car Wash offers multiple locations beyond our Uniontown car wash location. Our Akron location also offers a [self-service pet wash](https://hometowncw.com/self-service-pet-wash/). 
One noticeable difference you’ll come to love about Hometown Car Wash locations is our bay-style wash areas. Bays offer considerable advantages over tunnel-style car washes. First, you have the benefit of control and customization. If you have one area of your vehicle requiring extra attention, such as your tires or rims, you can ensure those areas receive the focus they need. Targeting in this way ensures that your vehicle is as clean as it can be, with a sparkling finish.
Another wonderful difference is that you can choose the level of wash that fits your needs, from a gentle foam wash to an ultra pressure rinse, and everything in between. Our goal at our Uniontown car wash location, just like at all of our locations, is to provide you with the products and services that best fit your vehicle’s needs.
We feel that our bay-style approach provides superior cleaning results, more custom options, and greater convenience. It aligns with our desire to serve you and provide the best products and services available in the area. At our Uniontown location, we offer two touch-free automatic bays which makes it both speedy and convenient to get you in and out fast! For those who desire the ultimate car wash options, you won’t find any better than Hometown Car Wash!
Our locations are located within 15 minutes of one another to make using a Hometown Car Wash convenient:

# Testimonials
 

 
 
 
 
 Kristin Valentine

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 I always get my oil changed here because it’s convenient, close to work and very friendly. My last visit involved a problem that they identified. They not only recommended a good garage for repairing the problem, but they made sure all of my levels were where they needed to be so that I could make it safely there. This was at no charge and I couldn’t be more grateful. They could have changed my oil, charged me and sent me on my way. These guys care about their customers and they care about the community.

 

 
 
 
 
 Jesse French

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 I will literally drive 30 minutes just to take our vehicles here. The service guys were friendly, professional, fast, and thorough. The already competitively-priced oil change included a complementary car wash... a cool modern brushless wash that managed to get all the bugs off. Oh, and without saying a word about it, they noticed my veteran plate and applied a 20% veteran discount! They also have self-serve car washes and a pet wash booth!

 

 
 
 
 
 Emily Schultz

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 My husband and I have had the best customer service here. We love the monthly car wash membership and get our oil changes all done at Lowell Express Car Wash! Bruce cares so much about the community of Lowell and he truly is a leader in the Lowell community. Bruce is letting Aldi build next to the car wash because he knows the Lowell community wants it and he wants to help. My family will continue to support Lowell Express Car Wash! Another example, is the friendly service and smiles from everyone during each oil change. The workers explain to me what they are doing and what any issues are end they do in a way someone like me who isn’t familiar with car mechanics can understand. I love this community and this business!

 

 
 
 
 
 Beckie Davidson

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 Love this place! They are always honest, friendly, and super helpful! Andrew went above and beyond and helped me figure out how to reset my A/C today, which is now working perfectly! Highly recommend!

 

 
 
 
 
 Taylor Pagliei

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 Stopped here on my lunch break and wow I’m so glad I did! Andrew and Bill were so knowledgeable and kind. No wait time and they were so efficient! Plus it came with free car wash! You’ve gained a new customer 🤩

 

 
 
 
 
 Emily Larson

 

 
 ★★★★★
 

 Our car’s engine temperature light came on while we were at their car wash. They were kind enough to take a look for us and check it over. They refilled our coolant and gave us recommendations for where to take it next all without any charge. One of their workers also took the time to explain to us in detail what he believed the problem was. If you’re looking for a place that’s going to treat you like family, this is your place. Thanks for all your help guys!
